column1: Complications to trial and issues arising in free text
See summary of analysis in Trial 19 folder
There was a switching of primary outcome during the trail which is specifically referenced in the paper
All but one of the switches in pre-specified outcome can be clearly seen in the trial registry
There are an additional 6 secondary outcomes reported in the Appendix that were not pre-specified and are not reported in the paper itself, nor highlighted as being non pre-specified
